calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-18-2018 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2017 Set For Trial On Jun-11-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Defendant Vista Equity Partners Management, Llc'S Demurrer To Complaint (For Tentative Ruling Only)
Off Calendar Aug-01-2017 Text Ruling

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Scott M. Stillman of the law offices of McGuinn, Hillsman & Palefsky (415-421-9292) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Joseph Sanderson of the law offices of Kirkland & Ellis LLP (212-446-4759) appears as counsel for defendant/demurring party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Defendant Vista Equity Partners Management, LLC's demurrer to the three causes of action alleged in plaintiff Halcyon Financial Technology's complaint is overruled in its entirety. See clerk's .doc (Word Minutes) for details. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Angela Bradstreet; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR No. 12353, email: mviscio@sftc.org. (D302)
